<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type animation = Nil | Forward | Backward
  module type PAGE_TRANSITION_CONF =
    sig
      type screenshot
      val screenshot_container :
        Page_transition.PAGE_TRANSITION_CONF.screenshot option ->
        Html_types.div_content Eliom.Content.Html.elt
    end
  module Make :
    (Conf : PAGE_TRANSITION_CONF) ->
      sig
        type screenshot = Conf.screenshot
        val install_global_handler :
          ?transition_duration:float ->
          take_screenshot:((Page_transition.Make.screenshot -> unit) -> unit) ->
          animation_type:(Eliom.Client.changepage_event ->
                          Page_transition.animation) ->
          unit
      end
  val install_global_handler_withURI :
    ?transition_duration:float ->
    take_screenshot:((string -> unit) -> unit) ->
    animation_type:(Eliom.Client.changepage_event ->
                    Page_transition.animation) ->
    unit
end >>
